ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
// =============================================
// btnCalculate.OnSelect
// Runs on the currently selected partition
// =============================================

// ── STEP 1: Energy-average L1 across positions ──
ClearCollect(
    col_CalcL1Avg,
    With(
        {
            _l1Rows: Filter(col_MeasurementDisplay, MeasurementType = "L1"),
            _n: CountRows(Filter(col_MeasurementDisplay, MeasurementType = "L1"))
        },
        {
            Hz100: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz100 / 10)), 10),
            Hz125: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz125 / 10)), 10),
            Hz160: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz160 / 10)), 10),
            Hz200: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz200 / 10)), 10),
            Hz250: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz250 / 10)), 10),
            Hz315: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz315 / 10)), 10),
            Hz400: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz400 / 10)), 10),
            Hz500: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz500 / 10)), 10),
            Hz630: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz630 / 10)), 10),
            Hz800: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz800 / 10)), 10),
            Hz1000: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz1000 / 10)), 10),
            Hz1250: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz1250 / 10)), 10),
            Hz1600: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz1600 / 10)), 10),
            Hz2000: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz2000 / 10)), 10),
            Hz2500: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz2500 / 10)), 10),
            Hz3150: 10 * Log(Average(_l1Rows, Power(10, Hz3150 / 10)), 10)
        }
    )
);

// ── STEP 2: Energy-average L2 across positions ──
ClearCollect(
    col_CalcL2Avg,
    With(
        {
            _l2Rows: Filter(col_MeasurementDisplay, MeasurementType = "L2")
        },
        {
            Hz100: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz100 / 10)), 10),
            Hz125: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz125 / 10)), 10),
            Hz160: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz160 / 10)), 10),
            Hz200: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz200 / 10)), 10),
            Hz250: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz250 / 10)), 10),
            Hz315: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz315 / 10)), 10),
            Hz400: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz400 / 10)), 10),
            Hz500: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz500 / 10)), 10),
            Hz630: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz630 / 10)), 10),
            Hz800: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz800 / 10)), 10),
            Hz1000: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz1000 / 10)), 10),
            Hz1250: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz1250 / 10)), 10),
            Hz1600: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz1600 / 10)), 10),
            Hz2000: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz2000 / 10)), 10),
            Hz2500: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz2500 / 10)), 10),
            Hz3150: 10 * Log(Average(_l2Rows, Power(10, Hz3150 / 10)), 10)
        }
    )
);

// ── STEP 3: Get B2 and average T2 ──
UpdateContext({
    _b2: First(Filter(col_MeasurementDisplay, MeasurementType = "B2")),
    _l1: First(col_CalcL1Avg),
    _l2: First(col_CalcL2Avg)
});

ClearCollect(
    col_CalcT2Avg,
    With(
        {
            _t2Rows: Filter(col_MeasurementDisplay, MeasurementType = "T2")
        },
        {
            Hz100: Average(_t2Rows, Hz100),
            Hz125: Average(_t2Rows, Hz125),
            Hz160: Average(_t2Rows, Hz160),
            Hz200: Average(_t2Rows, Hz200),
            Hz250: Average(_t2Rows, Hz250),
            Hz315: Average(_t2Rows, Hz315),
            Hz400: Average(_t2Rows, Hz400),
            Hz500: Average(_t2Rows, Hz500),
            Hz630: Average(_t2Rows, Hz630),
            Hz800: Average(_t2Rows, Hz800),
            Hz1000: Average(_t2Rows, Hz1000),
            Hz1250: Average(_t2Rows, Hz1250),
            Hz1600: Average(_t2Rows, Hz1600),
            Hz2000: Average(_t2Rows, Hz2000),
            Hz2500: Average(_t2Rows, Hz2500),
            Hz3150: Average(_t2Rows, Hz3150)
        }
    )
);

UpdateContext({_t2: First(col_CalcT2Avg)});

// ── STEP 4: Background correction on L2 ──
// >10dB: no correction. 6-10dB: energy subtract. <6dB: L2 - 1.3
ClearCollect(
    col_BgCorrection,
    ForAll(
        Table(
            {Freq: "100",  L2Val: _l2.Hz100,  B2Val: _b2.Hz100},
            {Freq: "125",  L2Val: _l2.Hz125,  B2Val: _b2.Hz125},
            {Freq: "160",  L2Val: _l2.Hz160,  B2Val: _b2.Hz160},
            {Freq: "200",  L2Val: _l2.Hz200,  B2Val: _b2.Hz200},
            {Freq: "250",  L2Val: _l2.Hz250,  B2Val: _b2.Hz250},
            {Freq: "315",  L2Val: _l2.Hz315,  B2Val: _b2.Hz315},
            {Freq: "400",  L2Val: _l2.Hz400,  B2Val: _b2.Hz400},
            {Freq: "500",  L2Val: _l2.Hz500,  B2Val: _b2.Hz500},
            {Freq: "630",  L2Val: _l2.Hz630,  B2Val: _b2.Hz630},
            {Freq: "800",  L2Val: _l2.Hz800,  B2Val: _b2.Hz800},
            {Freq: "1000", L2Val: _l2.Hz1000, B2Val: _b2.Hz1000},
            {Freq: "1250", L2Val: _l2.Hz1250, B2Val: _b2.Hz1250},
            {Freq: "1600", L2Val: _l2.Hz1600, B2Val: _b2.Hz1600},
            {Freq: "2000", L2Val: _l2.Hz2000, B2Val: _b2.Hz2000},
            {Freq: "2500", L2Val: _l2.Hz2500, B2Val: _b2.Hz2500},
            {Freq: "3150", L2Val: _l2.Hz3150, B2Val: _b2.Hz3150}
        ) As row,
        With(
            {_diff: row.L2Val - row.B2Val},
            {
                Freq: row.Freq,
                L2Raw: row.L2Val,
                B2Raw: row.B2Val,
                Diff: _diff,
                L2Corrected: If(
                    _diff >= 10,
                    row.L2Val,
                    _diff >= 6,
                    10 * Log(
                        Max(
                            Power(10, row.L2Val / 10) - Power(10, row.B2Val / 10),
                            Power(10, -10)
                        ),
                        10
                    ),
                    row.L2Val - 1.3
                ),
                CorrectionType: If(
                    _diff >= 10, "None",
                    _diff >= 6, "Energy",
                    "Limited"
                )
            }
        )
    )
);

// Pivot back to single row for downstream calcs
ClearCollect(
    col_CalcL2Corrected,
    {
        Hz100:  LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "100").L2Corrected,
        Hz125:  LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "125").L2Corrected,
        Hz160:  LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "160").L2Corrected,
        Hz200:  LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "200").L2Corrected,
        Hz250:  LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "250").L2Corrected,
        Hz315:  LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "315").L2Corrected,
        Hz400:  LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "400").L2Corrected,
        Hz500:  LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "500").L2Corrected,
        Hz630:  LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "630").L2Corrected,
        Hz800:  LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "800").L2Corrected,
        Hz1000: LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "1000").L2Corrected,
        Hz1250: LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "1250").L2Corrected,
        Hz1600: LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "1600").L2Corrected,
        Hz2000: LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "2000").L2Corrected,
        Hz2500: LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "2500").L2Corrected,
        Hz3150: LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = "3150").L2Corrected
    }
);
// ── Build after col_CalcT2Avg is populated ──
ClearCollect(
    col_Reverberation,
    ForAll(
        Table(
            {Freq: "100",  FreqSort: 1,  AvgVal: _t2.Hz100},
            {Freq: "125",  FreqSort: 2,  AvgVal: _t2.Hz125},
            {Freq: "160",  FreqSort: 3,  AvgVal: _t2.Hz160},
            {Freq: "200",  FreqSort: 4,  AvgVal: _t2.Hz200},
            {Freq: "250",  FreqSort: 5,  AvgVal: _t2.Hz250},
            {Freq: "315",  FreqSort: 6,  AvgVal: _t2.Hz315},
            {Freq: "400",  FreqSort: 7,  AvgVal: _t2.Hz400},
            {Freq: "500",  FreqSort: 8,  AvgVal: _t2.Hz500},
            {Freq: "630",  FreqSort: 9,  AvgVal: _t2.Hz630},
            {Freq: "800",  FreqSort: 10, AvgVal: _t2.Hz800},
            {Freq: "1000", FreqSort: 11, AvgVal: _t2.Hz1000},
            {Freq: "1250", FreqSort: 12, AvgVal: _t2.Hz1250},
            {Freq: "1600", FreqSort: 13, AvgVal: _t2.Hz1600},
            {Freq: "2000", FreqSort: 14, AvgVal: _t2.Hz2000},
            {Freq: "2500", FreqSort: 15, AvgVal: _t2.Hz2500},
            {Freq: "3150", FreqSort: 16, AvgVal: _t2.Hz3150}
        ) As row,
        With(
            {
                _t2Rows: Filter(col_MeasurementDisplay, MeasurementType = "T2"),
                _freqField: Switch(
                    row.Freq,
                    "100", "Hz100", "125", "Hz125", "160", "Hz160",
                    "200", "Hz200", "250", "Hz250", "315", "Hz315",
                    "400", "Hz400", "500", "Hz500", "630", "Hz630",
                    "800", "Hz800", "1000", "Hz1000", "1250", "Hz1250",
                    "1600", "Hz1600", "2000", "Hz2000", "2500", "Hz2500",
                    "3150", "Hz3150"
                )
            },
            {
                Freq: row.Freq,
                FreqSort: row.FreqSort,
                DisplayFreq: Switch(
                    row.Freq,
                    "1000", "1k", "1250", "1.25k", "1600", "1.6k",
                    "2000", "2k", "2500", "2.5k", "3150", "3.15k",
                    row.Freq
                ) & "Hz",
                T2Avg: Round(row.AvgVal, 2),
                RTCorrection: Round(10 * Log(row.AvgVal / 0.5, 10), 2),
                ReadingCount: CountRows(_t2Rows),
                MinVal: Round(
                    Min(_t2Rows,
                        Switch(row.Freq,
                            "100", Hz100, "125", Hz125, "160", Hz160,
                            "200", Hz200, "250", Hz250, "315", Hz315,
                            "400", Hz400, "500", Hz500, "630", Hz630,
                            "800", Hz800, "1000", Hz1000, "1250", Hz1250,
                            "1600", Hz1600, "2000", Hz2000, "2500", Hz2500,
                            "3150", Hz3150
                        )
                    ), 2
                ),
                MaxVal: Round(
                    Max(_t2Rows,
                        Switch(row.Freq,
                            "100", Hz100, "125", Hz125, "160", Hz160,
                            "200", Hz200, "250", Hz250, "315", Hz315,
                            "400", Hz400, "500", Hz500, "630", Hz630,
                            "800", Hz800, "1000", Hz1000, "1250", Hz1250,
                            "1600", Hz1600, "2000", Hz2000, "2500", Hz2500,
                            "3150", Hz3150
                        )
                    ), 2
                ),
                Spread: Round(
                    Max(_t2Rows,
                        Switch(row.Freq,
                            "100", Hz100, "125", Hz125, "160", Hz160,
                            "200", Hz200, "250", Hz250, "315", Hz315,
                            "400", Hz400, "500", Hz500, "630", Hz630,
                            "800", Hz800, "1000", Hz1000, "1250", Hz1250,
                            "1600", Hz1600, "2000", Hz2000, "2500", Hz2500,
                            "3150", Hz3150
                        )
                    )
                    -
                    Min(_t2Rows,
                        Switch(row.Freq,
                            "100", Hz100, "125", Hz125, "160", Hz160,
                            "200", Hz200, "250", Hz250, "315", Hz315,
                            "400", Hz400, "500", Hz500, "630", Hz630,
                            "800", Hz800, "1000", Hz1000, "1250", Hz1250,
                            "1600", Hz1600, "2000", Hz2000, "2500", Hz2500,
                            "3150", Hz3150
                        )
                    ), 2
                ),
                StandardisedTo: 0.5
            }
        )
    )
);

// Free flags from same data
UpdateContext({
    _bgCorrectionApplied: CountRows(Filter(col_BgCorrection, CorrectionType = "Energy")) > 0,
    _limitedByBackground: CountRows(Filter(col_BgCorrection, CorrectionType = "Limited")) > 0
});

UpdateContext({_l2c: First(col_CalcL2Corrected)});

// ── STEP 5: Calculate D (level difference) per frequency ──
// D = L1_avg - L2_corrected
ClearCollect(
    col_CalcD,
    {
        Hz100: _l1.Hz100 - _l2c.Hz100,
        Hz125: _l1.Hz125 - _l2c.Hz125,
        Hz160: _l1.Hz160 - _l2c.Hz160,
        Hz200: _l1.Hz200 - _l2c.Hz200,
        Hz250: _l1.Hz250 - _l2c.Hz250,
        Hz315: _l1.Hz315 - _l2c.Hz315,
        Hz400: _l1.Hz400 - _l2c.Hz400,
        Hz500: _l1.Hz500 - _l2c.Hz500,
        Hz630: _l1.Hz630 - _l2c.Hz630,
        Hz800: _l1.Hz800 - _l2c.Hz800,
        Hz1000: _l1.Hz1000 - _l2c.Hz1000,
        Hz1250: _l1.Hz1250 - _l2c.Hz1250,
        Hz1600: _l1.Hz1600 - _l2c.Hz1600,
        Hz2000: _l1.Hz2000 - _l2c.Hz2000,
        Hz2500: _l1.Hz2500 - _l2c.Hz2500,
        Hz3150: _l1.Hz3150 - _l2c.Hz3150
    }
);

UpdateContext({_d: First(col_CalcD)});

// ── STEP 6: Calculate DnT per frequency ──
// DnT = D + 10*log10(T/0.5)
ClearCollect(
    col_CalcDnT,
    {
        Hz100: _d.Hz100 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz100 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz125: _d.Hz125 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz125 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz160: _d.Hz160 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz160 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz200: _d.Hz200 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz200 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz250: _d.Hz250 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz250 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz315: _d.Hz315 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz315 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz400: _d.Hz400 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz400 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz500: _d.Hz500 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz500 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz630: _d.Hz630 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz630 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz800: _d.Hz800 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz800 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz1000: _d.Hz1000 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz1000 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz1250: _d.Hz1250 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz1250 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz1600: _d.Hz1600 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz1600 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz2000: _d.Hz2000 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz2000 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz2500: _d.Hz2500 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz2500 / 0.5, 10),
        Hz3150: _d.Hz3150 + 10 * Log(_t2.Hz3150 / 0.5, 10)
    }
);

UpdateContext({_dnt: First(col_CalcDnT)});
// ── After Step 6 (col_CalcDnT), build display collection ──
ClearCollect(
    col_LevelDifference,
    ForAll(
        Table(
            {Freq: "100",  FreqSort: 1,  L1Val: _l1.Hz100,  L2Val: _l2.Hz100,  L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz100,  B2Val: _b2.Hz100,  T2Val: _t2.Hz100,  DVal: _d.Hz100,  DnTVal: _dnt.Hz100},
            {Freq: "125",  FreqSort: 2,  L1Val: _l1.Hz125,  L2Val: _l2.Hz125,  L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz125,  B2Val: _b2.Hz125,  T2Val: _t2.Hz125,  DVal: _d.Hz125,  DnTVal: _dnt.Hz125},
            {Freq: "160",  FreqSort: 3,  L1Val: _l1.Hz160,  L2Val: _l2.Hz160,  L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz160,  B2Val: _b2.Hz160,  T2Val: _t2.Hz160,  DVal: _d.Hz160,  DnTVal: _dnt.Hz160},
            {Freq: "200",  FreqSort: 4,  L1Val: _l1.Hz200,  L2Val: _l2.Hz200,  L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz200,  B2Val: _b2.Hz200,  T2Val: _t2.Hz200,  DVal: _d.Hz200,  DnTVal: _dnt.Hz200},
            {Freq: "250",  FreqSort: 5,  L1Val: _l1.Hz250,  L2Val: _l2.Hz250,  L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz250,  B2Val: _b2.Hz250,  T2Val: _t2.Hz250,  DVal: _d.Hz250,  DnTVal: _dnt.Hz250},
            {Freq: "315",  FreqSort: 6,  L1Val: _l1.Hz315,  L2Val: _l2.Hz315,  L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz315,  B2Val: _b2.Hz315,  T2Val: _t2.Hz315,  DVal: _d.Hz315,  DnTVal: _dnt.Hz315},
            {Freq: "400",  FreqSort: 7,  L1Val: _l1.Hz400,  L2Val: _l2.Hz400,  L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz400,  B2Val: _b2.Hz400,  T2Val: _t2.Hz400,  DVal: _d.Hz400,  DnTVal: _dnt.Hz400},
            {Freq: "500",  FreqSort: 8,  L1Val: _l1.Hz500,  L2Val: _l2.Hz500,  L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz500,  B2Val: _b2.Hz500,  T2Val: _t2.Hz500,  DVal: _d.Hz500,  DnTVal: _dnt.Hz500},
            {Freq: "630",  FreqSort: 9,  L1Val: _l1.Hz630,  L2Val: _l2.Hz630,  L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz630,  B2Val: _b2.Hz630,  T2Val: _t2.Hz630,  DVal: _d.Hz630,  DnTVal: _dnt.Hz630},
            {Freq: "800",  FreqSort: 10, L1Val: _l1.Hz800,  L2Val: _l2.Hz800,  L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz800,  B2Val: _b2.Hz800,  T2Val: _t2.Hz800,  DVal: _d.Hz800,  DnTVal: _dnt.Hz800},
            {Freq: "1000", FreqSort: 11, L1Val: _l1.Hz1000, L2Val: _l2.Hz1000, L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz1000, B2Val: _b2.Hz1000, T2Val: _t2.Hz1000, DVal: _d.Hz1000, DnTVal: _dnt.Hz1000},
            {Freq: "1250", FreqSort: 12, L1Val: _l1.Hz1250, L2Val: _l2.Hz1250, L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz1250, B2Val: _b2.Hz1250, T2Val: _t2.Hz1250, DVal: _d.Hz1250, DnTVal: _dnt.Hz1250},
            {Freq: "1600", FreqSort: 13, L1Val: _l1.Hz1600, L2Val: _l2.Hz1600, L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz1600, B2Val: _b2.Hz1600, T2Val: _t2.Hz1600, DVal: _d.Hz1600, DnTVal: _dnt.Hz1600},
            {Freq: "2000", FreqSort: 14, L1Val: _l1.Hz2000, L2Val: _l2.Hz2000, L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz2000, B2Val: _b2.Hz2000, T2Val: _t2.Hz2000, DVal: _d.Hz2000, DnTVal: _dnt.Hz2000},
            {Freq: "2500", FreqSort: 15, L1Val: _l1.Hz2500, L2Val: _l2.Hz2500, L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz2500, B2Val: _b2.Hz2500, T2Val: _t2.Hz2500, DVal: _d.Hz2500, DnTVal: _dnt.Hz2500},
            {Freq: "3150", FreqSort: 16, L1Val: _l1.Hz3150, L2Val: _l2.Hz3150, L2CorrVal: _l2c.Hz3150, B2Val: _b2.Hz3150, T2Val: _t2.Hz3150, DVal: _d.Hz3150, DnTVal: _dnt.Hz3150}
        ) As row,
        With(
            {
                _bgRow: LookUp(col_BgCorrection, Freq = row.Freq),
                _rtCorr: 10 * Log(row.T2Val / 0.5, 10)
            },
            {
                Freq: row.Freq,
                FreqSort: row.FreqSort,
                DisplayFreq: Switch(
                    row.Freq,
                    "1000", "1k", "1250", "1.25k", "1600", "1.6k",
                    "2000", "2k", "2500", "2.5k", "3150", "3.15k",
                    row.Freq
                ) & "Hz",
                L1Avg: Round(row.L1Val, 1),
                L2Avg: Round(row.L2Val, 1),
                L2Corrected: Round(row.L2CorrVal, 1),
                B2: Round(row.B2Val, 1),
                T2Avg: Round(row.T2Val, 2),
                RTCorrection: Round(_rtCorr, 1),
                CorrectionType: _bgRow.CorrectionType,
                D: Round(row.DVal, 1),
                DnT: Round(row.DnTVal, 1)
            }
        )
    )
);

// ── STEP 7: ISO 717-1 curve fitting ──
// Reference curve values (airborne)
ClearCollect(
    col_ISORef,
    {Hz100: 33, Hz125: 36, Hz160: 39, Hz200: 42, Hz250: 45, Hz315: 48,
     Hz400: 51, Hz500: 52, Hz630: 53, Hz800: 54, Hz1000: 55, Hz1250: 56,
     Hz1600: 56, Hz2000: 56, Hz2500: 56, Hz3150: 56}
);

UpdateContext({_ref: First(col_ISORef)});

// Try shifts from -20 to +30 in 1dB steps
// Find highest shift where sum of unfavourable deviations <= 32
ClearCollect(
    col_ShiftResults,
    ForAll(
        Sequence(51, -20) As shift,
        With(
            {
                _s: shift.Value,
                _devSum:
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz100 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz100) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz125 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz125) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz160 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz160) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz200 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz200) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz250 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz250) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz315 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz315) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz400 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz400) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz500 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz500) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz630 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz630) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz800 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz800) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz1000 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz1000) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz1250 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz1250) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz1600 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz1600) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz2000 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz2000) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz2500 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz2500) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz3150 + shift.Value) - _dnt.Hz3150)
            },
            {
                Shift: _s,
                DevSum: _devSum,
                Passes: _devSum <= 32
            }
        )
    )
);

// DnT,w = 500Hz value of reference + best shift
UpdateContext({
    _bestShift: Max(Filter(col_ShiftResults, Passes), Shift)
});

UpdateContext({
    _DnTw: _ref.Hz500 + _bestShift
});

// Also do for D (without RT normalisation) to get Dw
ClearCollect(
    col_ShiftResultsD,
    ForAll(
        Sequence(51, -20) As shift,
        With(
            {
                _devSum:
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz100 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz100) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz125 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz125) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz160 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz160) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz200 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz200) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz250 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz250) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz315 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz315) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz400 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz400) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz500 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz500) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz630 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz630) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz800 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz800) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz1000 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz1000) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz1250 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz1250) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz1600 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz1600) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz2000 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz2000) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz2500 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz2500) +
                    Max(0, (_ref.Hz3150 + shift.Value) - _d.Hz3150)
            },
            {
                Shift: shift.Value,
                DevSum: _devSum,
                Passes: _devSum <= 32
            }
        )
    )
);

UpdateContext({
    _bestShiftD: Max(Filter(col_ShiftResultsD, Passes), Shift),
    _Dw: _ref.Hz500 + Max(Filter(col_ShiftResultsD, Passes), Shift)
});

// ── STEP 8: Spectrum adaptation terms C and Ctr ──
// C = XA - DnTw
// Ctr = XA,tr - DnTw

// Noise spectrum 1 (pink + A-weight) for C
// Noise spectrum 2 (traffic + A-weight) for Ctr
UpdateContext({
    _C: Round(
        -10 * Log(
            Power(10, (-29 - _dnt.Hz100) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-26 - _dnt.Hz125) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-23 - _dnt.Hz160) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-21 - _dnt.Hz200) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-19 - _dnt.Hz250) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-17 - _dnt.Hz315) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-15 - _dnt.Hz400) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-13 - _dnt.Hz500) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-12 - _dnt.Hz630) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-11 - _dnt.Hz800) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-10 - _dnt.Hz1000) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-9 - _dnt.Hz1250) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-9 - _dnt.Hz1600) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-9 - _dnt.Hz2000) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-9 - _dnt.Hz2500) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-9 - _dnt.Hz3150) / 10),
            10
        ) - _DnTw,
        0
    ),
    _Ctr: Round(
        -10 * Log(
            Power(10, (-20 - _dnt.Hz100) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-20 - _dnt.Hz125) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-18 - _dnt.Hz160) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-16 - _dnt.Hz200) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-15 - _dnt.Hz250) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-14 - _dnt.Hz315) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-13 - _dnt.Hz400) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-12 - _dnt.Hz500) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-11 - _dnt.Hz630) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-9 - _dnt.Hz800) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-8 - _dnt.Hz1000) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-9 - _dnt.Hz1250) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-10 - _dnt.Hz1600) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-11 - _dnt.Hz2000) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-13 - _dnt.Hz2500) / 10) +
            Power(10, (-15 - _dnt.Hz3150) / 10),
            10
        ) - _DnTw,
        0
    )
});

UpdateContext({
    _DnTwPlusCtr: _DnTw + _Ctr
});

// ── STEP 9: Pass/Fail ──
UpdateContext({
    _result: If(
        _DnTwPlusCtr >= cVar_CurrentPartition.RequiredValue,
        "Pass",
        "Fail"
    )
});

// ── STEP 10: Save results ──
Patch(
    BESA_TestRuns,
    LookUp(BESA_TestRuns, BESA_TestRun = cVar_CurrentPartition.PartitionID),
    {
        SummaryResults: JSON(
            {
                Dw: _Dw,
                DnTw: _DnTw,
                C: _C,
                Ctr: _Ctr,
                DnTwPlusCtr: _DnTwPlusCtr,
                RequiredValue: cVar_CurrentPartition.RequiredValue,
                Result: _result,
                DSpectral: {
                    '100': Round(_d.Hz100, 1), '125': Round(_d.Hz125, 1),
                    '160': Round(_d.Hz160, 1), '200': Round(_d.Hz200, 1),
                    '250': Round(_d.Hz250, 1), '315': Round(_d.Hz315, 1),
                    '400': Round(_d.Hz400, 1), '500': Round(_d.Hz500, 1),
                    '630': Round(_d.Hz630, 1), '800': Round(_d.Hz800, 1),
                    '1000': Round(_d.Hz1000, 1), '1250': Round(_d.Hz1250, 1),
                    '1600': Round(_d.Hz1600, 1), '2000': Round(_d.Hz2000, 1),
                    '2500': Round(_d.Hz2500, 1), '3150': Round(_d.Hz3150, 1)
                },
                DnTSpectral: {
                    '100': Round(_dnt.Hz100, 1), '125': Round(_dnt.Hz125, 1),
                    '160': Round(_dnt.Hz160, 1), '200': Round(_dnt.Hz200, 1),
                    '250': Round(_dnt.Hz250, 1), '315': Round(_dnt.Hz315, 1),
                    '400': Round(_dnt.Hz400, 1), '500': Round(_dnt.Hz500, 1),
                    '630': Round(_dnt.Hz630, 1), '800': Round(_dnt.Hz800, 1),
                    '1000': Round(_dnt.Hz1000, 1), '1250': Round(_dnt.Hz1250, 1),
                    '1600': Round(_dnt.Hz1600, 1), '2000': Round(_dnt.Hz2000, 1),
                    '2500': Round(_dnt.Hz2500, 1), '3150': Round(_dnt.Hz3150, 1)
                }
            }
        )
    }
);

// ── STEP 11: Update collection ──
UpdateIf(
    col_AcousticPartitions,
    PartitionID = cVar_CurrentPartition.PartitionID,
    {
        DnTwPlusCtr: _DnTwPlusCtr,
        PassFail: _result
    }
);

// ── STEP 12: Refresh measurement display to show results ──
Select(btnRefreshMeasurements_2);

Notify(
    "DnT,w = " & Text(_DnTw) & " (" & Text(_C) & " ; " & Text(_Ctr) & ")"
    & "  |  DnT,w + Ctr = " & Text(_DnTwPlusCtr) & " dB"
    & "  |  " & _result,
    If(_result = "Pass", NotificationType.Success, NotificationType.Error)
);

If(
    IsBlank(TaskNameInput_96.Text) || TaskNameInput_96.Text = "" ||
    IsBlank(TaskNameInput_97.Text) || TaskNameInput_97.Text = "" ||
    CountRows(Filter(col_PermPostAtmosphericConditions, Complete = true)) <> CountRows(col_PermPostAtmosphericConditions),
    DisplayMode.Disabled,
    DisplayMode.Edit
)

SortByColumns(
    AddColumns(
        col_AcousticTestRuns,
        StatusIcon,
        Switch(
            TestStatus,
            "Complete", "✓",
            "In Progress", "🔄",
            "⚠️"
        ),
        CompletedCount,
        CountRows(
            Filter(col_AcousticPartitions, TestRunID = TestRunID && TestStatus = "Complete")
        ),
        TotalCount,
        CountRows(
            Filter(col_AcousticPartitions, TestRunID = TestRunID)
        )
    ),
    "RunDate",
    SortOrder.Ascending
)

Switch(
    ThisItem.MeasurementType,
    "Header", RGBA(0, 80, 80, 1),
    "RatingD", RGBA(230, 245, 255, 1),
    "RatingDnT", RGBA(220, 240, 220, 1),
    "RatingLnT", RGBA(220, 240, 220, 1),
    Color.White
)

Switch(
    ThisItem.MeasurementType,
    "Header", RGBA(0, 80, 80, 1),
    "RatingD", RGBA(230, 245, 255, 1),
    "RatingDnT", RGBA(220, 240, 220, 1),
    "RatingLnT", RGBA(220, 240, 220, 1),
    Color.White
)

Switch(
    ThisItem.MeasurementType,
    "Header", RGBA(0, 80, 80, 1),
    "RatingD", RGBA(230, 245, 255, 1),
    "RatingDnT", RGBA(220, 240, 220, 1),
    "RatingLnT", RGBA(220, 240, 220, 1),
    Color.White
)

If(
    ThisItem.Diff < 6,
    RGBA(200, 50, 50, 1),
    ThisItem.Diff < 10,
    RGBA(200, 150, 0, 1),
    Color.Black
)

Switch(
    ThisItem.MeasurementType,
    "Header", RGBA(0, 80, 80, 1),
    "RatingD", RGBA(230, 245, 255, 1),
    "RatingDnT", RGBA(220, 240, 220, 1),
    "RatingLnT", RGBA(220, 240, 220, 1),
    Color.White
)

Switch(
    ThisItem.MeasurementType,
    "Header", RGBA(0, 80, 80, 1),
    "RatingD", RGBA(230, 245, 255, 1),
    "RatingDnT", RGBA(220, 240, 220, 1),
    "RatingLnT", RGBA(220, 240, 220, 1),
    Color.White
)

If(
    ThisItem.D < 6,
    RGBA(200, 50, 50, 1),
    ThisItem.D < 10,
    RGBA(200, 150, 0, 1),
    Color.Black
)
LookUp(BESA_ServiceCatalogues, Service = varActionRecord.'Booking Element LookUp'.'Order Service LookUp'.Service, 'Test Type')

Switch(
    ThisItem.MeasurementType,
    "Header", RGBA(0, 80, 80, 1),
    "RatingD", RGBA(230, 245, 255, 1),
    "RatingDnT", RGBA(220, 240, 220, 1),
    RGBA(0, 0, 0, 0)
)

varTestViewMode && varTestMenu.MenuCategory = "Test Data" //(varTestViewMode || (!IsBlank(varActionRecord.'Test Status') && varActionRecord.'Test Status' <> "Pending")) && varTestMenu.MenuCategory = "Test Data"

JSON(
    ForAll(
        Sort(col_AcousticPartitions,PartitionLabel) As p,
        {
            id: Text(p.PartitionID),
            partitionLabel: p.PartitionLabel,
            testReportNumber: If(IsBlank(p.TestReportNumber), "", p.TestReportNumber),
            testCategory: p.TestCategory,
            partitionType: p.PartitionType,
            sourceRoom: p.SourceRoom,
            sourceRoomVolume: p.SourceRoomVolume,
            receiverRoom: p.ReceiverRoom,
            receiverRoomVolume: p.ReceiverRoomVolume,
            separatingElementArea: p.SeparatingElementArea,
            metricToReport: p.MetricToReport,
            standardisedRT: p.StandardisedRT,
            requiredValue: If(IsBlank(p.RequiredValue), 0, p.RequiredValue),
            L1: p.L1,
            L2: p.L2,
            B2: p.B2,
            T2: p.T2,
            sixDbOk: If(IsBlank(p.SixDbRuleMet), false, p.SixDbRuleMet),
            bgCorr: If(IsBlank(p.BackgroundCorrectionApplied), false, p.BackgroundCorrectionApplied),
            fitToTest: If(IsBlank(p.FitToTest), false, p.FitToTest),
            provisionalResult: If(IsBlank(p.ProvisionalResult), "", p.ProvisionalResult),
            verifiedResult: If(IsBlank(p.VerifiedResult), "", p.VerifiedResult),
            comments: If(IsBlank(p.Comments), "", p.Comments)
        }
    )
)

Set(
    varTestMenu,
    Self.Selected
);
If(
    Self.Selected.MenuCategory = "Test Data",
    Set(
        varTestSubMenu,
        "Equipment"
    )
);
Switch(
    Self.Selected.MenuCategory,
    "Equipment",
    With(
        {_testInfo: ParseJSON(varActionRecord.'Test Info')},
    // ── Load equipment into editable collection ──
        ClearCollect(
            col_AcousticEquipment,
            {
                Sort: 1,
                EquipmentType: "Sound Level Meter",
                SelectedValue: Text(_testInfo.SoundLevelMeter),
                Required: true
            },
            {
                Sort: 2,
                EquipmentType: "Microphone",
                SelectedValue: Text(_testInfo.Microphone),
                Required: true
            },
            {
                Sort: 3,
                EquipmentType: "Calibrator",
                SelectedValue: Text(_testInfo.Calibrator),
                Required: true
            },
            {
                Sort: 4,
                EquipmentType: "Sound Source",
                SelectedValue: Text(_testInfo.SoundSource),
                Required: true
            },
            {
                Sort: 5,
                EquipmentType: "Tapping Machine",
                SelectedValue: Text(_testInfo.TappingMachine),
                Required: Text(varServiceTestType) in [
                    "Impact Test",
                    "Airborne & Impact Test",
                    "Sound Insulation Test",
                    "General Acoustic Testing"
                ]
            }
        )
    ),
    "Partition",
    ClearCollect(
    col_TestRunsAndPartitions,
    AddColumns(
        col_AcousticTestRuns,
        IsPartition, false,
        StatusIcon, Switch(TestStatus, "Complete", "✓", "In Progress", "🔄", "⚠️"),
        CompletedCount, CountRows(Filter(col_AcousticPartitions, TestRunID = TestRunID && TestStatus = "Complete")),
        TotalCount, CountRows(Filter(col_AcousticPartitions, TestRunID = TestRunID)),
        DisplayResult, "",
        DisplayRequired, "",
        DisplayDeviations, "",
        PartitionNo, 0
    )
);

Collect(
    col_TestRunsAndPartitions,
    AddColumns(
        col_AcousticPartitions,
        IsPartition, true,
        StatusIcon, Switch(TestStatus, "Complete", "✓", "In Progress", "🔄", "⚠️"),
        CompletedCount, 0,
        TotalCount, 0,
        DisplayResult,
        If(
            TestCategory = "Impact",
            If(!IsBlank(LnTw), Text(LnTw) & " dB", "—"),
            If(!IsBlank(DnTwPlusCtr), Text(DnTwPlusCtr) & " dB", "—")
        ),
        DisplayRequired,
        If(
            TestCategory = "Impact",
            "≤" & Text(RequiredValue) & " dB",
            "≥" & Text(RequiredValue) & " dB"
        ),
        DisplayDeviations,
        If(!SixDbRuleMet, "[4]", "")
            & If(ResultLimitedByBackground, " ≥/≤", "")
    )
)
)
